records.ety: [Prob. fr. Icel. te<?/ja to spread manure, fr. ta<?/ manure; akin to MHG. zetten to scatter, spread. √58. Cf. Teathe.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Tedded (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Tedding.]

defs: To spread, or turn from the swath, and scatter for drying, as new-mowed grass; -- chiefly used in the past participle.
quotes: The smell of grain or tedded grass.
The tedded hay and corn sheaved in one field.
